final:
module CarrierFrequencyRecovery (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire modulated_signal,
    output reg obf_carrier_signal
);
    
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            obf_carrier_signal <= 0;
        end else begin
            // Toggle the obf_carrier_signal on the rising edge of the modulated_signal
            if (modulated_signal) begin
                obf_carrier_signal <= ~obf_carrier_signal;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
